title: Living in Boulder vlog 4 - 8 - 2017: 20 Area Dimensions still

enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps his day on April 8, 2017 in Boulder: helping his mom with errands and dishes, working late into the night on what appears to be an art or design project (filling in buttons/shapes on a page), and rewatching a movie on Netflix while taking notes. He notes it's around 2:25-2:30 AM and that the next day is his last day of winter break before returning to work.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: thinks it is really well made and enjoyed it as much as the first time
excited to be close to finishing a page, feels like it has taken forever
